title: ehretia thonningiana
intro: Ehretia thonningiana, also known as the West African ehretia or bush willow, is a small to medium-sized tree native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ehretia thonningiana include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and insecticide. In terms of herbal preparations, Ehretia thonningiana is often made into a decoction, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
